title: Track Last Updated Date for Salesforce Fields with Change History
description:
Adds a second Salesforce API request during object metadata refresh to fetch the FieldDefinition SOQL query, which includes LastModifiedDate for each field. When a field's LastModifiedDate is newer than the locally stored date, the system logs the change history and updates the local record.

The implementation adds a 'Last Updated' column to the dictionary field table and maintains a change history log with clock icons:
- A per-field clock icon shows that specific field's change history
- A top-level clock icon shows all field changes at a glance across the object
- Change events include 'Field Updated' (when Salesforce field metadata changes) and 'New Field' (when a new field is discovered)

The history output is restricted to: Name, Label, Type, and Last Updated Date.
acceptance_criteria: Salesforce metadata refresh fetches FieldDefinition data including LastModifiedDate
Fields with newer LastModifiedDate have their history logged
Last Updated column displays in the dictionary field table
Per-field clock icon shows individual field change history
Top-level clock icon shows all field changes across the object
Change history shows Name, Label, Type, and Last Updated Date
ux_changes: Last Updated column in dictionary table. Clock icons for per-field and object-level change history. History popup shows Name, Label, Type, Last Updated Date.
middleware_changes: FieldDefinition SOQL query added to the refresh flow. Change detection compares LastModifiedDate. History logging for field updates and new field discoveries.
data_model_changes: Last modified date column added to field records. Change history log table with event type (Field Updated, New Field).
api_changes: Second Salesforce API call during refresh: FieldDefinition SOQL query with LastModifiedDate, Description, DeveloperName, etc.
implementation_notes: Salesforce FieldDefinition does not include CreatedDate, so the system uses its own record creation timestamp to log 'New Field' events. Two SOQL queries run during refresh: the describe endpoint and the FieldDefinition query.
comment_summary: Developer implemented dual-API refresh with change detection. Discussion refined the UX to show Last Updated as a column rather than a separate popup. Event types (Field Updated, New Field) added to the history log.
